show databases
drop table if exists default.customer_sample_cust_lineage

CREATE TABLE default.customer_sample_cust_lineage AS
SELECT
  Sex,
  State,
  COUNT(*) AS customer_count,
  AVG(Age) AS avg_age
FROM customer_temp_view
GROUP BY Sex, State
